notifications.grantReceivedTunnelWelcome: We were just connected through this tunnel—you can ask questions here and their workspace answers under the access they granted. What's a good first question to try?

emptyState.prompt: Ask anything about your docs, email, or calendar.
emptyState.tunnelOutboundPromptAnonymous: Messaging another Brain through a tunnel.
emptyState.notificationsOverflow: At least one more item is not shown.
emptyState.peerSharingSummaryAnonymous: Someone is now sharing with you

agentConversation.jumpToLatestStreamingAria: Jump to latest, reply in progress

bootstrapWelcome.headline: Your second brain is taking shape.
bootstrapWelcome.body1: Braintunnel reads your email to build a personal wiki — notes about people, projects, interests, anything important to you. That wiki is your assistant’s memory, and it grows over time.
bootstrapWelcome.body2: We’re starting with your most recent messages as we continue to download more of your mail. The more you use Braintunnel, the more complete the picture gets.

agentChat.deleteTunnelDialogBody: This ends the tunnel to {{label}}. To message them again, open a new Braintunnel.

history.emptyTunnels: A Braintunnel routes your questions to another user's AI assistant.

coldQuery.introLead: A Braintunnel is a private line to another user's assistant. Get quick answers from their assistant to get things done.
coldQuery.messagePlaceholder: What do you want to ask?
coldQuery.noMatches: No matches. Try another spelling or email.
coldQuery.pickRecipientHint: Type to search, then pick someone from the list.
coldQuery.grantExists: You already have a tunnel with this person — pick them under Tunnels and send from there.
coldQuery.rateLimited: You already reached out recently. Try again a bit later.

b2b.awaitingReceiptLabel: Received · they'll approve the reply before it sends
b2b.awaitingReceiptBody: Their assistant received your message. When they approve the suggested reply, you'll see it here.
b2b.awaitingReceiptTooltip: You'll see their reply here after they approve it to send.

approval.title: Review answer before sending
approval.description: Edit the answer if needed, then approve or decline the inbound request.

emptyState.headline: All caught up
emptyState.subhead: No tunnel replies are waiting for you to send or review.
emptyState.detailBody: When a collaborator is waiting on your answer, you approve it before it sends.
emptyState.compactSubhead: No tunnel replies are waiting to send or review, and nothing is waiting for your approval before it sends.
emptyState.pickHint: Select an item from the list to preview messages, edit the draft, and send or decline.

autoSendConfirm.title: Turn on auto-send for {{handle}}?
autoSendConfirm.body1: Your assistant will automatically respond on your behalf without your review. You can still read the full thread afterward.
autoSendConfirm.body2: You can change this anytime here or under Brain access.

policy.handshakeDescription: How should your assistant handle queries from this person?
policy.replyPendingPolicy: A draft will load here after you accept.

tunnels.composeFooterAssistOnly: This goes to their assistant, not as a direct message to them.
tunnels.outboundUnavailable: Messaging isn’t available until we can load this tunnel.
tunnels.outboundPreConnectHint: This message will also send a request to connect.
tunnels.pickPrompt: Pick a tunnel in the sidebar to see activity here.

connection.sheetTriggerAria: Open tunnel access and reply settings
connection.policySelectAria: What this person may learn from your workspace
connection.accessHeading: What they may learn from your workspace
connection.accessHintOther: This connection uses custom policy text. Edit it under Brain access.

replyHint.review: Nothing is sent until you approve each draft in this thread.
replyHint.auto: Your assistant may send answers as soon as they are ready. You can read them here afterward.
replyHint.ignore: Their questions will not receive answers through this tunnel.
replyHint.ignoreActiveHeader: Not answering their questions — pick Manual or Automatic to resume replies.

input.placeholder: What do you need to know or get done?
input.queuedMessagesAria: Messages queued to send when assistant finishes
input.queueMessageAria: Queue message to send when assistant finishes
